name: Freedom Energy Holdings, Inc.
summary: Freedom Energy Holdings, Inc. develops technologies for the energy industry sector. It offers KC-9000, a proprietary heavy oil technology for assisting in the recovery of heavy oil; and SR 139 technology to extract hydro-carbons from asphalt shingles. The company formerly known as Freedom Financial Holdings and changed its name to Freedom Energy Holdings, Inc. in January 2010. Freedom Energy Holdings, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Wayne, Indiana.
